title: Langflow Code Injection
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-33017 is a code injection vulnerability in Langflow that can allow building public flows without requiring authentication, and it is being exploited in the wild. No patch is currently available, making it a high-risk item. Why now: This vulnerability is being actively exploited in the wild, making it a high-priority item. (confidence: 0.90)
